baseline.summary: Driven Computer Science sophomore at RVCE with a passion for building robust backend systems. Experienced in multi-agent orchestration, AI systems development, and full-stack web application creation. Seeking an internship at Brightloop to contribute innovative solutions and gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced team environment.

lines.text: - Designed and shipped Meridian, a multi-agent system for financial due diligence, demonstrating proficiency with Python, FastAPI, and asyncio.
- Developed Anchor, an n8n-orchestrated job-pipeline system that integrates multiple data sources to create factually-grounded application packets.
- Built CrowdSense, a real-time crowd-monitoring platform combining CSRNet and YOLOv8 for dynamic density estimation, showcasing experience with React, FastAPI, and OpenCV.
- Proficient in Python and familiar with TypeScript, aligning well with the tech stack at Brightloop.
- Strong background in full-stack web application development, having built end-to-end projects such as Meridian and Anchor.
- Experienced in AI/ML systems, including multi-agent orchestration, LLM evaluation, and RAG-based approaches.
- Pursuing a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science at RVCE with a focus on ML engineering and backend systems.

cover_letter_paragraphs: I am writing to express my enthusiasm for the Software Engineering Intern - Full Stack position at Brightloop. With a strong foundation in computer science and a passion for building robust backend systems, I am eager to contribute innovative solutions while gaining hands-on experience in your fast-paced team environment.

My projects, such as Meridian, have equipped me with extensive experience in multi-agent orchestration and AI-assisted coding tools. This aligns well with the nice-to-have requirements of your role, particularly my exposure to Python and FastAPI. Additionally, my work on Anchor highlights my ability to develop full-stack web applications, providing a seamless integration between frontend and backend.

I am particularly drawn to Brightloop’s culture of small team collaboration and fast iteration, which I believe will provide an ideal setting for me to grow both technically and professionally. My commitment to delivering high-quality code and my willingness to collaborate closely with the product engineering team make me a strong fit for this internship role.

Thank you for considering my application. I am excited about the opportunity to bring my skills and experience to Brightloop, and I look forward to the possibility of contributing to your mission-driven projects. Best regards,

violations: Line 1 (from <uuid>) claims 'Designed and shipped Meridian, a multi-agent system for financial due diligence, demonstrating proficiency with Python, FastAPI, and asyncio.' — the Source entry only mentions Meridian being an orchestration system that produces cited due-diligence memos using asyncio, but does not specify Python or FastAPI.
